clinical_blockers: Systemic symptoms, facial swelling, rapid worsening, generic infection signs, generic lesion colour or border, fixed four-to-six-week timing, and dose-bearing treatment remain unsupported.
Acne severity and acne vulgaris remain clinician-assessed; no autonomous treatment is generated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
